 Beyond ERP. A Connected Business Operations Platform 
 
 
 
 Upbuff extends ERP systems into real-world business execution — connecting sales, service,
 inventory, logistics, partners, and compliance on a single platform. 
 
 
 
 A product by UpBuff Technologies | SAP Business One &
 Beas integrated 
 
 
 
 
 Customer Relationship 
 Management 
 
 
 
 Field Service 
 Management 
 
 
 
 Inventory & Warehouse 
 Management
 Solution 
 
 
 
 Sales & Distribution 
 Management 
 
 
 
 Manufacturing 
 Touchpoints 
 
 
 
 Portals & Integrations 
 Systems 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 We design and build products that solve real problems and deliver meaningful value. 
 
 
 See Work → 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 One Platform for End-to-End Business Operations 
 Upbuff connects ERP systems with day-to-day business execution across branches,
 warehouses, field teams, partners,
 and digital channels — ensuring visibility, control, and accuracy across the enterprise. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Designed for ERP-Driven Organizations 
 Purpose-built for businesses where ERP accuracy,
 compliance, and auditability are non-negotiable. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Real-Time Synchronization 
 WEvery transaction stays aligned with ERP — no
 duplication, no reconciliation headaches. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Modular & Configurable 
 Adopt only what you need today. Scale modules as
 operations grow. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Proven in Complex Environments 
 Trusted across manufacturing, EPC, distribution,
 and service-intensive industries. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built to Handle Complex Business Operations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Inventory, Movement & Supply Chain 
 Intercompany, branch & warehouse transfers 
 
 Inventory and asset management 
 
 Purchase and delivery management 
 
 Van sales and last-mile execution 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Sales, Service & Field Operations 
 CRM and opportunity management 
 
 Field Service Management (FSM) 
 
 Product configurator 
 
 Expense management 
 
 Shop floor and extended workflows 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Partner, Dealer & Customer Ecosystem 
 Channel, distributor & dealer portals 
 
 Customer, supplier & service partner portals 
 
 Style Guides & Assets 
 
 Role-based access and audit trails 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ERP, Compliance & Integrations 
 SAP Business One & Beas integration 
 
 ZATCA & ZRA compliance 
 
 Shopify & Unicommerce integration 
 
 WhatsApp integration 
 
 Document management (Pick & Post for SAP) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built for Industries That Run on ERP 
 
 ERP Extension Architecture 
 Designed as an extension layer, not a replacement — Upbuff keeps ERP as the system of
 record while expanding its reach. 
 
 Built for Operational Scale 
 Supports multi-branch, multi-warehouse, partner-led, and compliance-heavy environments. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Get a Glimps of what Upbuff CRM 
 can do for your
 business 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Get a
 free consultation  → 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Frequently asked questions 
 Have other questions or just want to chat? Book a call and let's figure it out together. 
 Book a call 
 
 
 
 
 What is Upbuff, and how is it different from traditional CRM or FSM tools? 
 
 Upbuff is an ERP extension platform , not a standalone CRM or FSM.
 While traditional tools operate in isolation, Upbuff is designed to extend
 ERP systems into real-world business operations such as sales execution,
 field service, inventory movement, logistics, partner collaboration, and
 compliance — all in real time. 
 ERP remains the system of record. Upbuff ensures execution
 happens
 without breaking data integrity. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is Upbuff a replacement for our ERP system? 
 
 No. Upbuff is not an ERP replacement. 
 It is built to work alongside ERP systems like SAP Business One ,
 extending their reach to operational teams, partners, and external
 stakeholders. 
 
 This approach eliminates duplicate data entry,
 reconciliation issues, and fragmented systems. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Which ERP systems does Upbuff support? 
 
 Upbuff is natively integrated with SAP Business One , including Beas Manufacturing , and is designed to integrate with other ERP
 systems based on business requirements. 
 The platform architecture ensures secure, real-time
 synchronization with ERP
 without compromising performance or compliance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can we implement only specific modules, or is it an all-or-nothing platform? 
 
 Upbuff follows a modular architecture. 
 You can start with specific capabilities such as CRM, Field Service
 Management, inventory movement, or partner portals — and scale
 additional modules as your business grows. 
 
 All modules are designed to work seamlessly together when
 needed. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How does Upbuff handle complex inventory and intercompany operations? 
 
 Upbuff supports complex operational scenarios including: 
 Intercompany, branch, and warehouse transfers 
 
 Asset and spare parts tracking 
 
 Van sales and last-mile delivery 
 
 Purchase and dispatch workflows 
 All movements are synchronized with ERP in real time, ensuring full
 traceability and audit readiness. 
 
 
 
 
 Does Upbuff support partner, dealer, and customer portals? 
 
 Yes. Upbuff includes role-based portals for: 
 Channel partners, distributors, and dealers 
 
 Customers and suppliers 
 
 Service partners and external technicians 
 Each portal is governed by granular permissions and audit trails to ensure
 secure collaboration without exposing sensitive ERP data. 
 
 
 
 
 How does Upbuff support compliance and regulatory requirements? 
 
 Upbuff is built for compliance-heavy environments . 
 It supports integrations such as ZATCA and ZRA , along with
 document management and audit trails that align with regulatory
 requirements. 
 
 Compliance workflows are embedded into operational processes
 rather than treated as afterthoughts. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can Upbuff integrate with e-commerce and external systems? 
 
 Yes. Upbuff integrates with platforms such as Shopify, Unicommerce,
 WhatsApp , and other external systems to ensure seamless order flow,
 communication, and document exchange. 
 Integrations are designed to maintain ERP data consistency
 at all times. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How does Upbuff support field teams and mobile operations? 
 
 Upbuff provides mobile-first experiences for sales teams, service
 engineers, and delivery staff, enabling: 
 On-site execution 
 
 Real-time updates 
 
 Offline capabilities (where applicable) 
 
 Faster approvals and reporting 
 This ensures productivity without disconnecting from ERP workflows. 
 
 
 
 
 Is Upbuff suitable for multi-branch and multi-country operations? 
 
 Yes. Upbuff is designed to scale across: 
 Multiple branches and warehouses 
 
 Distributed field teams 
 
 Partner-led sales and service models 
 
 Multi-country operations with local compliance needs 
 The platform supports centralized control with localized execution. 
 
 
 
 
 How is data security and access control managed? 
 
 Upbuff offers role-based access control , user permission audits,
 and transaction-level visibility.
 Users only see what they are authorized to see, ensuring secure operations
 while maintaining accountability across internal and external users. 
 
 
 
 
 Who implements and supports Upbuff? 
 
 Upbuff is implemented and supported by UpBuff Technologies ,
 specialists in ERP-centric solution architecture and enterprise
 integrations. 
 From discovery and design to go-live and ongoing support,
 implementations
 are tailored to your business processes — not forced into generic
 templates. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How long does a typical Upbuff implementation take? 
 
 Implementation timelines vary based on modules, integrations, and business
 complexity.
 Most implementations follow a phased approach, allowing organizations to go
 live quickly while expanding capabilities over time. 
 A detailed implementation roadmap is defined during the
 discovery phase. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is Upbuff suitable for small teams, or only large enterprises? 
 
 Upbuff is designed for growing and enterprise-grade organizations that rely on ERP accuracy.
 Its modular approach makes it suitable for smaller teams today, with the
 ability to scale as operational complexity increases. 
 
 
 
 
 How do we get started with Upbuff? 
 
 The best way to start is with a guided demo tailored to your business
 processes and ERP environment. 
 Our team will walk you through relevant modules, integration
 touchpoints, and an implementation approach aligned with your goals. 
 Request a Demo
  → 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A note from the founder 
 Most ERP systems are powerful at managing data, but businesses struggle when it comes to
 executing day-to-day operations beyond ERP screens. 
 
 Upbuff was built to bridge this gap — to extend ERP systems into sales execution,
 field service, inventory movement, partner collaboration, and compliance, without
 compromising data integrity. 
 
 Our focus has always been simple: 
 help organizations run real-world operations with ERP accuracy. 
 
 — Shiburaj Krishna, Rajesh K Founders 
 UpBuff Technologies
